original: Geddanium’s crystalline form is extremely rare, owing to its propensity for elegantly alloying with other materials. While this property may have it highly sought-after for industrial and military uses, it also makes its pure crystalline form a treasured scarcity. Raw crystal Geddanium focuses laser beams cohesive enough to burn a target over a light year away, fearlessly bond with noble gasses in the right conditions, and even siphon exotic energies at high efficiencies.
